query:
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.aiDescription,
  m.imageUrl,
  m.calories,
  m.protein,
  m.carbs,
  m.fat
FROM meals m
WHERE (m.aiDescription LIKE '%Vitamin C%' OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%Vitamin D3%')
  AND m.source = 'nutrition_label'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
